Core Physics / Metrics: Net CO2e mass; energy used; grid mix.
Monotonicity Requirement: Increasing energy use per unit carbon removed must strictly increase r_carbon.
Key Research Task: Calibrate safe/gold/hard bands for net intensity using CCUS and Phoenix pilot data.

Core Physics / Metrics: t90 decay; leachate toxicity; micro-residue; PFAS residue.
Normalization Goal: Longer decay time and higher toxicity → higher sub-risks (r_t90, r_tox, r_micro, r_PFAS_resid).
Monotonicity Requirement: Increasing any sub-risk must not decrease the aggregated r_materials.
Key Research Task: Finalize aggregation formula (e.g. weighted quadratic) and prove its monotonicity; calibrate corridors with lab and field data.

Core Physics / Metrics: Habitat connectivity; structural complexity; colonization potential.
Normalization Goal: Lower connectivity and complexity → higher sub-risks (r_conn, r_comp, r_colon).
Monotonicity Requirement: Reducing habitat quality must monotonically increase r_biodiversity and V_t.
Key Research Task: Develop ecological rationale for metrics and calibrate corridor bands with local reef/wetland/MAR data.

Normalization Goal: Higher HLR and greater surcharge → higher r_hydraulic.
Monotonicity Requirement: Increasing hydraulic stress must strictly increase r_hydraulic.
Key Research Task: Standardize kernels and calibrate corridor bands using MAR and canal simulation plus Phoenix replay data.

Core Physics / Metrics: Schema compliance errors; sensor drift, noise, bias.
Normalization Goal: More errors or drift → higher r_calib and r_sigma.
Monotonicity Requirement: Increasing data uncertainty must raise r_calib/r_sigma and may trigger derate/stop.
Key Research Task: Propagate kernels to all shard families and build three-tier pipelines (simulation, lab, field) for r_sigma; enforce r_calib gates in ker_deployable.
